subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of what was and what shall be! Thy letter hath reached Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا مهدی ای ارض تکون علیک بهاء الله رب ما کان و ما یکون قد حضر کتابک لدی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
